Career

Work Experience

2024 — Present
Social Media Manager
Alamdar Trading Company LTD

  • Plan, launch, and manage Facebook ad campaigns to generate leads and drive sales.
  • Manage and operate the JIJI platform, handling product listings and closing sales through online channels.
  • Track campaign performance, optimising for reach, engagement, and conversions.
  • Respond to customer inquiries and comments, maintaining strong online engagement and brand trust.

Assistant Social Media Manager
Digital City Ltd (INGCO)

  • Generated and followed up on leads through social media platforms and phone calls.
  • Prepared monthly sales reports for advertised products.
  • Handled daily posting and account monitoring for VIP client pages.
  • Delivered weekly and monthly performance reports and analytics.
2022 — 2023
Social Media Manager
Majaliwa Stores

2021 — 2022
